docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-29-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
RETURN OF NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE, SENT TO JIMMY DEERING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION SC-108A: ON PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR ORDER TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT---THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: TO GO TO COURT AS FOLLOWS; THE COURT WILL HEAR TESTIMONY IN ORDER TO ENTER A MONEY JUDGMENT IN LIEU OF THE FEB. 29, 2009 JUDGMENT FOR DAMAGES AND RESTITUTION.(COURT'S MOTION FOR CALENDAR DATE PER COURT ORDER). FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHLYAHOV, OLEG HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHLYAHOV, OLEG AS TO DEFENDANT DEERING, JIMMY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHLYAHOV, OLEG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEERING, JIMMY $1,692.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,787.00, IN ADDITION TO THE MONEY JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT SHALL DELIVER TO PLAINITFF( BY DEFENDANT PERSONALLY, OR A LICENSED AND INSURED SHIPPING COMPANY) THE ENGINE AND ANY OTHER PARTS AND COMPONENTS OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR WHICH MAY BE IN HIS POSSESSION. DELIVERY SHALL BE COMPLETED WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER THE JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. THE MONEY JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE AGREED SUM OF $2,317 REDUCED BY THE ESTIMATED VALUE OF OF DEFENDANT'S LABOR AND MATERIALS ON PLAINTIFF'S TRANSMISSION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURN OF MOTION-GRANTED NOTICE - SENT TO JIMMY DEERING

ORDER SC-108A: ORDER AFTER HEARING ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT; F: OTHER ORDERS: JUDGMENT IS AMENDED TO PROVIDE FOR DAMAGES AGAINST DEFT., AND FOR PLTFF IN THE SUM OF $7,500.00, PLUS COSTS; THE ORDER TO RETURN PARTS AND COMPONENTS IS VACATED. G: EXPLANATION: DEFT. FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S INITIAL JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SHLYAHOV, OLEG AS TO DEFENDANT DEERING, JIMMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURN OF ORDER OF DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT - SENT TO JIMMY DEERING
RETURN OF SC-108. SENT TO JIMMY DEERING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHLYAHOV, OLEG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEERING, JIMMY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,595.00, NOTE: JUDGMENT IS AMENDED TO PROVIDE FOR DAMAGES AGAINST DEFENDANT. JUDGMENT IS FOR PLAINTIFF IN THE SUM OF $7500.00, PLUS COSTS. THE ORDER TO RETURN PARTS AND COMPONENTS IS VACATED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S INITIAL JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-10-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEERING, JIMMY
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ADDED TO SMALL CLAIMS MOTION CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO VACATE FILED BY OLEG SHLYAHOV IS GRANTED.
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER FILED, BY PLTFF.

THE MOTION SC-108A: ON PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR ORDER TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT---THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: TO GO TO COURT AS FOLLOWS; THE COURT WILL HEAR TESTIMONY IN ORDER TO ENTER A MONEY JUDGMENT OF JUN-24-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR- AMENDED JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED ON JULY 23, 2009.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT WAS RETURNED-UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SC-108A SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
